data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Netflix utilizes a microservices architecture which allows individual services to be developed, deployed, and scaled independently.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Netflix runs its services on Amazon Web Services (AWS), utilizing its cloud computing capabilities to deliver content globally.
data.technical_spec: AWS S3, AWS EC2, Amazon CloudFront

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Netflix uses load balancers to distribute incoming network traffic across multiple servers, ensuring reliability and minimizing downtime.

data.title: Data Streaming
data.description: Leveraging technology for continuous data flow, enabling on-the-fly processing and analytics of streaming data.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Netflix employs a variety of database solutions optimized for different types of data and querying needs.
